title: Ultimate Performance and lots of QOL
description: this modpack consists of many carefully picked mods and libs to improve performace of minecraft and adds many other utility and customisation mods to improve overall expirience in-game.
body:
this modpack that consists of **many mods and libs** to improve performace of minecraft and adds many other **utility and customisation mods** to improve overall expirience in-game. It also adds: 
- > **[Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)**, a mod for **cosmetics and utility**, which lets you host your world to others without the need for a server.
- > **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)**, so you can zoom in to see distant objects.
- > **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)**, lets you override the max. render distance of (by default) 32.
- > **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**
- > **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)**
- > **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** (more options)
- > **[Reese´s Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** (better menu for video settings)
- > **[Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)** for minor tweaks like fast left/right-click
- > **[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)** (see shulker inventories more clear like when you place them down)
- > **[Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal)** (use unicode font emojis)
- > **[Vanilla Tweaks downloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/vtdownloader)** (download texture packs from your client)
- > **[Voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.2-2.5.12)**
- > **[Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)** (see recipes in a list)
- > **[Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)**
- > **[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)**
- > **[Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)**,
- > **[Inventory Managment](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management)**
- > **[Inventory Profiles Next (IPN)](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)**,
- > **[Frostbytes Improved Inventory](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostbytes-improved-inventory)**
- > **[ViafabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)** (join servers on different versions)
- > **[Worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)** (easier editing)
- > **[Xaero´s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)+[Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** 
#### and so much more!



## **Versions available:**

Older versions might come after i make **1.19**.
A **Forge port** is planned, more information in the **[**discord**](https://discord.gg/sxpAHCXy6T)**

## Disclaimer

Versions in **Alpha** (**1.20**) (v1.2.2) are only in alpha because its **very experimental** and i plan on fixing stuff as well as in the future **adding alternatives** to some mods you can't find as originals

Versions in **Beta** (**1.20.6**) (v1.2.4) + (1.3.0) are those that are technically a release but have random **stuff that needs fixing** (for example the bug where you frequently crash in singleplayer worlds and idk how to fix that yet)

**Releases** are versions that have been tested and found to work well and **no crashes** are **pretty much garanteed**

## How the modpack is tested

**Tests**:
- Singleplayer compatibility
- Multiplayer compatibility
- FPS (Tested on servers with high player counts like Hypixel)

**My system**:
- AMD Ryzen 5500 series
- Nvidia rtx 3060 12GB
- 16GB DDR4 RAM 3200mz
- 1080p@75 hz monitor
- 1440p@155 hz monitor

## Quick Note

Use at least **4-5GB RAM**, **6GB recommended**, especially if using **VR**

## Side note
As newer versions of the game come out you can expect some delay in me making compat for those versions because the mod devs already take a couple weeks to port their mods to newest version but as soon as they come out, this modpack will be updated to 1.21.2-1.21.3 / 1.21.4
